name: Tokyo revengers RPG
description:
Well, this is the first RPG bot I’ve made. The characters available so far are:

Senju, Sanzu, Terano, Shion, Mikey, Mitsuya, Draken, Chifuyu, Baji, Takemichi, Inupi, Smiley, Angry, Izana, Kakucho, Rindou, Ran, Taiju, Kokonoi, Akane, Hanma, Kazutora, Hakkai, Naoto, Hinata, Kisaki, Sanzu, Yuzuha, Pah-chin, Akkun, Kazushi, Takuya, Mana, Luna, shinichiro, baji’s mother, sano grandfather, Wakaza and Makoto.

The characters are very well described. If you feel that a character is missing or would like to request one, leave a comment and I’ll add them as soon as I see it. I’ll always be adding and updating characters.

Reminder: the personalities are the same as in the anime. If you want to change a character’s personality, you’ll need to progress the story with them!
creator: Kakoinnn
